posts.author: danaaviv (Dana Aviv - monday Sales CRM Expert)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi community!
Today’s biweekly CRM session has moved to tomorrow for a special edition on CRM’s new features.

Get ready for an in-depth look at all the features released from our CRM in 2024.

Here’s what you can expect:

  • A guided tour through the new feature released in 2024 so far

  • Pro tips on getting the most out of these updates

  • Use case demos of how these features can revolutionize your sales CRM workflow

P.S. Our regular biweekly sessions will return in May, and we’re excited to hear your suggestions for upcoming topics!

Feel free to let us know In the comments what you’d like us to cover on our next webinars!

Click here to register

posts.author: shayan.moussawi (Shayan Moussawi)
posts.cookedHtml:
